scripts.dev:b: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m dotenv -f backend\.env run -- .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --app-dir backend --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:security: npm audit --prefix frontend --omit=dev --audit-level=moderate && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip_audit -r backend\requirements.txt --progress-spinner off
scripts.stage:b: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m dotenv -f backend\.env.stage run -- .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --host 0.0.0.0
